zh.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Burdett是Sir Thomas Burdet和Ann Waldiff的兒子，於1387年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾納波洛。他於大約1425年與Joan Brome結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1440年登記服兵役。他去世於1440年在法國瑟-吉瓦朋托享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Burdett是Sir Thomas Burdet和Ann Waldiff的儿子，于1387年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾納波洛。他于大约1425年与Joan Brome结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1440年登记服兵役。他去世于1440年在法国瑟-吉瓦朋托享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Burdett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands, of Norman origin): perhaps from an Old French personal name Burdet, a pet form of an unrecorded ancient Germanic name, Burdo, or from Gaulish burdo ‘mule’.

variants.name: Burditt
meanings: English (Northamptonshire and Leicestershire, of Norman origin): variant of   Burdett  .

variants.name: Burdette
meanings: Altered form of French Burdet, a cognate of Burdin . Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

variants.name: Burden
meanings: (southern England, of Norman origin): from a diminutive of the ancient Germanic personal name Burdo, for which compare Burdett . Burdonus and other derivatives of the Gaulish personal name Burdo (‘mule’) are found in France, where it is rare and the similar French surname may derive instead from Old French bourdon in the sense ‘pilgrim's staff’ (compare Bourdon 1). The personal name, whether of ancient Germanic or Gaulish origin, does occur in medieval England, but rarely.

habitational name from any of various places called Burdon or Burden. Burden in Yorkshire and Great Burdon in County Durham are named with Old English burh ‘stronghold, fortified place’ + dūn ‘hill’; Burdon in Tyne and Wear is named with Old English b̄re ‘byre’ + denu ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Burdett was born in 1387, in Narborough, Leicestershire, England as the son of Sir Thomas Burdet and Ann Waldiff. He married Joan Brome about 1425. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He registered for military service in 1440. He died in 1440, in Pontoise, Seine-et-Oise, France, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Burdett est né en 1387, à Narborough, Leicestershire, Angleterre, fils de Sir Thomas Burdet et Ann Waldiff. Il a épousé Joan Brome environ 1425. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1440. Il est décédé en 1440, à Pontoise, Seine-et-Oise, France, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Burdett wurde 1387 in Narborough, Leicestershire, England, als Sohn von Sir Thomas Burdet und Ann Waldiff geboren. Er hat um 1425 Joan Brome geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er hat sich 1440 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1440 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Pontoise, Seine-et-Oise, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Burdett è nato il nel 1387 nel Narborough, Leicestershire, England come figlio di Sir Thomas Burdet e Ann Waldiff. Lui sposato Joan Brome circa 1425. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1440. Morì nel 1440, nel Pontoise, Seine-et-Oise, Francia, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Burdettは1387年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアナルボロウでSir Thomas BurdetとAnn Waldiffの息子として生まれた。約1425年にJoan Bromeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1440年に兵役登録をした。彼は1440年にフランスセアイネ-エト-オイゼポントイゼで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Burdett(은)는 1387년 영국 레이스스터실르 나르버루그h에서 Sir Thomas Burdet(와)과 Ann Waldiff의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1425년 Joan Brome(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1440년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1440년 프랑스 세이인-트-이스 폰토이스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Burdett nasceu em 1387, em Narborough, Leicestershire, Inglaterra filho de Sir Thomas Burdet e Ann Waldiff. Ele casou-se com Joan Brome aproximadamente 1425. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1440. Ele faleceu em 1440, em Pontoise, Seine-et-Oise, França, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Burdett родился в 1387 г. в местности нарбороую, лисестиршир, Англия. Его родителей звали Sir Thomas Burdet и Ann Waldiff. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Brome около 1425 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1440 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1440 г. в местности понтоис, сине-ет-оис, Франция в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Burdett nació en 1387, en Narborough, Leicestershire, Inglaterra como hijo de Sir Thomas Burdet y Ann Waldiff. Se casó con Joan Brome aproximadamente 1425. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1440. Murió en 1440, en Pontoise, Seine-et-Oise, Francia, a la edad de 53 años.
